THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST THE FPG DEFENDANTS ARE SET ASIDE AND THOSE DEFENDANTS MUST FILE THEIR PROPOSED ANSWER NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 20, 2017. ORDER SIGNED. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Set For Trial On Jul-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS FUNDS PLACEMENT GROUP, LLC. and FPG PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT as follows:

Defendants Funds Placement Group, LLC and FPG Partners, LLC's motion to set aside and vacate the default judgment is granted. The default and default judgment entered against the FPG defendants are set aside and those defendants must file their proposed answer no later than October 20, 2017. The FPG defendants have shown sufficient facts warranting the granting of this motion per CCP 473.5 and 473(b). Granting the motion is favored by California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and plaintiff Doublerock, LLC has not shown how it would suffer any legal prejudice by the granting of the motion.

[After hearing, the Court signed the proposed order submitted by email in accordance with the tentative ruling.]

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes Hunter CSR #6576 email: rhunter@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Reyes Hunter, CSR#6576.
John D. O'Connor, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Doublerock, LLC, a limited liability company.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Funds Placement Group, L.L.C., a limited liability company; FPG Partners L.L.C.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witness Suraj Rajwani sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $74,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,439.45
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $954.58
Total Judgment in the amount of $76,394.03
Judgment signed in open court.
